name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Atbroker Execution
notes:
This Building Block detects Atbroker executing non-deafualt Assistive Technology applications.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Mateusz Wydra, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Atbroker Execution
SIGMA Description: Atbroker executing non-deafualt Assistive Technology applications


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Atbroker Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of AtBroker.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%start%' AQL filter query

when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%animations%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%audiodescription%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%caretbrowsing%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%caretwidth%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%colorfiltering%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cursorscheme%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%filterkeys%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%focusborderheight%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%focusborderwidth%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%highcontrast%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%keyboardcues%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%keyboardpref%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%magnifierpane%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%messageduration%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%minimumhitradius%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%mousekeys%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%narrator%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%osk%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%overlappedcontent%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%showsounds%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%soundsentry%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%stickykeys%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%togglekeys%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windowarranging%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windowtracking%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windowtrackingtimeout%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windowtrackingzorder%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Atbroker Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of AtBroker.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%start%' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%animations%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%audiodescription%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%caretbrowsing%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%caretwidth%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%colorfiltering%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cursorscheme%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%filterkeys%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%focusborderheight%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%focusborderwidth%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%highcontrast%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%keyboardcues%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%keyboardpref%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%magnifierpane%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%messageduration%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%minimumhitradius%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%mousekeys%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%narrator%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%osk%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%overlappedcontent%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%showsounds%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%soundsentry%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%stickykeys%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%togglekeys%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windowarranging%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windowtracking%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windowtrackingtimeout%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windowtrackingzorder%')) AQL filter query
